title: TipRanks reveals the top 10 Wall Street industrial sector analysts
text: TipRanks' analyst ranking service ranks the top Wall Street firms of the past decade.

title: Parker-Hannifin Corporation: Flying High (Rating Downgrade)
text: Parker-Hannifin Corporation has turned itself into a dealmaking machine in recent years. The company has integrated these deals well, showing solid growth and earnings power. Leverage is rapidly coming down, and the operational performance is strong, making me continue to be upbeat about Parker-Hannifin stock in the long haul.

title: Parker-Hannifin: Dominating A Fragmented $135 Billion Market
text: Parker-Hannifin is a global leader in the Motion & Control industry, with a 16% CAGR over the past decade and aims to increase its market share from 13% to 20%. The company is diversified across various end markets and sees growth opportunities in Aerospace, Digitalization, Electrification, and clean technologies. PH plans to expand its Aerospace & Defense segment to 33% of its portfolio, recently acquiring Meggitt for 6.3 billion pounds and expects $300 million in cost synergies by FY26.

title: Parker-Hannifin (PH) Up 23% YTD: Will the Momentum Continue?
text: Strength across end-markets, improving supply chains and benefits from the Win Strategy should drive Parker-Hannifin's (PH) growth.

title: Parker Scheduled to Present at the Wells Fargo Industrials
text: CLEVELAND, June 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it is scheduled to present at the Wells Fargo Industrials Conference in Chicago, Illinois on June 14, 2023 at 11:00 a.m. Central time (12:00 p.m. Eastern time). title: Parker Scheduled to Present at the Wells Fargo Industrials Conference on June 14 at 11:00 a.m. Central Time (12:00 p.m.
text: CLEVELAND, June 07, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it is scheduled to present at the Wells Fargo Industrials Conference in Chicago, Illinois on June 14, 2023 at 11:00 a.m. Central time (12:00 p.m. Eastern time).
